task.title: How to use the CDS Performance Report to find specific information?
How does the detailed performance in terms of clarifications look like for a specific CDS?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Performance Report tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Encounter Clarification Rate, Clarifications Sent, Financial Impact Clarifications, Other Impact Clarifications, SEV Clarifications, Response Rate, Agreement Rate KPI cards.
step.stepresult: These KPI cards display at-a-glance view into the performance of the selected CDS in terms of clarification activity in the selected time period.

task.title: What percentage of clarifications sent by a CDS are agreed? How many clarifications sent by a CDS are not responded?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Performance Report tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Clarifications by Response chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays count of clarifications for each response type. Use this chart to identify number of clarifications with Agreed response. Use the tool-tip to get percentage of agreed clarifications.
Click on No Response legend to analyze the count of clarifications that are not responded. Clarification Details tabular report now displays clarification details for the clarifications that are not responded. Sort the tabular report by the Provider column and identify the providers who did not respond to the clarifications sent by the CDS.
Click on Retracted legend to analyze the count of clarifications that are retracted. Clarification Details tabular report now displays clarification details for the clarifications that are retracted. Sort the tabular report by the Provider column and identify the providers who have retracted the clarification.

task.title: What percentage of clarifications sent by a CDS were MCC clarifications? How many MCC clarifications sent by CDS were not agreed? What is the clarification level details around MCC clarifications sent by CDS?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Performance Report tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Clarifications by Type chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays count of clarifications that were sent for each type. Use this chart to analyze count and percentage of MCC clarifications sent by a CDS.
Click on the MCC section and analyze the Clarification Details tabular report. The report now displays list of MCC clarifications sent by a CDS.

task.title: How many clarifications sent by a CDS had potential for financial impact?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Performance Report tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Financial Impact Clarification chart.
step.stepresult: This chart displays count of clarifications sent by a CDS that had potential for financial impact.

task.title: How many clarifications were sent for the Medicare cases?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Performance Report tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Clarifications Sent KPI card.
step.stepresult: This KPI card displays count of clarifications sent in the selected time period.

step.cmd: Select Medicare from the Payer filter to analyze count of clarifications sent for the Medicare cases.

task.title: How does the detailed performance in terms of reviews look like for a specific CDS?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Performance Report tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Encounters, Review Rate, Encounters Reviewed, Initial Review Goal, and Average Initial review TAT (Hrs.) KPI cards.
step.stepresult: These KPI cards display at-a-glance view into the performance of the selected CDS in terms of review activity in the selected time period.

task.title: How many encounters reviewed by a CDS were Reconciled with Impact? What percentage of encounters reviewed by a CDS are Ready to Reconcile?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Performance Report tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Reviews by Encounter Status chart.
step.stepresult: This chart displays total count of encounters for each encounter status.

step.cmd: click on the Ready to Reconcile legend to analyze the count of encounters with Ready to Reconcile status in the tabular report.

task.title: What are the details around Review Not Needed encounters?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Performance Report tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Select Review Not Needed from the Encounter Status filter.
step.stepresult: The CDS Performance Report now displays data for Review Not Needed encounters. Refer the Encounter Details tabular report to view encounter level details.
